members.name: GetExtension
members.summary: Returns the [GDExtension] at the given file [param path], or [code]null[/code] if it has not been loaded or does not exist.

members.name: GetLoadedExtensions
members.summary: Returns the file paths of all currently loaded extensions.

members.name: IsExtensionLoaded
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the extension at the given file [param path] has already been loaded successfully. See also [method get_loaded_extensions].

members.name: LoadExtension
members.summary: Loads an extension by absolute file path. The [param path] needs to point to a valid [GDExtension]. Returns [constant LOAD_STATUS_OK] if successful.

members.name: LoadExtensionFromFunction
members.signature: public int LoadExtensionFromFunction(String path, const GDExtensionInitializationFunction* initFunc)
members.summary: Loads the extension already in address space via the given path and initialization function. The [param path] needs to be unique and start with [code]"libgodot://"[/code]. Returns [constant LOAD_STATUS_OK] if successful.

members.name: ReloadExtension
members.summary: Reloads the extension at the given file path. The [param path] needs to point to a valid [GDExtension], otherwise this method may return either [constant LOAD_STATUS_NOT_LOADED] or [constant LOAD_STATUS_FAILED]. [b]Note:[/b] You can only reload extensions in the editor. In release builds, this method always fails and returns [constant LOAD_STATUS_FAILED].

members.name: UnloadExtension
members.summary: Unloads an extension by file path. The [param path] needs to point to an already loaded [GDExtension], otherwise this method returns [constant LOAD_STATUS_NOT_LOADED].

signals.name: ExtensionLoaded
signals.summary: Emitted after the editor has finished loading a new extension. [b]Note:[/b] This signal is only emitted in editor builds.

signals.name: ExtensionUnloading
signals.summary: Emitted before the editor starts unloading an extension. [b]Note:[/b] This signal is only emitted in editor builds.

signals.name: ExtensionsReloaded
signals.summary: Emitted after the editor has finished reloading one or more extensions.

values.name: LOAD_STATUS_ALREADY_LOADED
values.summary: The extension has already been loaded.

values.name: LOAD_STATUS_FAILED
values.summary: The extension has failed to load, possibly because it does not exist or has missing dependencies.

values.name: LOAD_STATUS_NEEDS_RESTART
values.summary: The extension requires the application to restart to fully load.

values.name: LOAD_STATUS_NOT_LOADED
values.summary: The extension has not been loaded.

constants.name: LOAD_STATUS_FAILED
constants.summary: The extension has failed to load, possibly because it does not exist or has missing dependencies.

constants.name: LOAD_STATUS_ALREADY_LOADED
constants.summary: The extension has already been loaded.

constants.name: LOAD_STATUS_NOT_LOADED
constants.summary: The extension has not been loaded.

constants.name: LOAD_STATUS_NEEDS_RESTART
constants.summary: The extension requires the application to restart to fully load.
